ops.text: Prioritize Location permission in onboarding and redirect to App Info for 'Always' access
Add 'Deny' (Permanent Ban) functionality to Browser Approval UI

ops.find_block:
// HARDCODED SAFE: Apps that use WebViews but are trusted (e.g. AI tools)
    private val HARDCODED_SAFE_APPS = setOf("com.openai.chatgpt")

        "cn.tydic.ethiopay",
        "com.osp.app.signin",
        "com.trm.tunnel",

    )

ops.text: Reduce Quitter Protocol wait time to 2 hours
Sync Emergency Protocol UI strings with 2-hour wait / 3-hour expiry

ops.find_block:
title = { Text("EXTREME CAUTION") },
                text = { Text("You are initiating the Nuclear Option.

1. A code will be generated.
2. You MUST wait 3 hours before using it.
3. Protection will only drop for 1 hour.

Do not do this unless it is a genuine emergency.", color = Color.White) },
ops.replace_with:
title = { Text("EXTREME CAUTION") },
                text = { Text("You are initiating the Nuclear Option.

1. A code will be generated.
2. You MUST wait 2 hours before using it.
3. Protection will only drop for 1 hour.

Do not do this unless it is a genuine emergency.", color = Color.White) },
